note: Enhanced health endpoint to actually ping Redis and report healthy/unhealthy/not_configured status. Added Redis health to overall degraded status calculation. All 3 DoD criteria verified: (1) API endpoints catch Redis failures via ResilientCacheService decorator and fall back to PostgreSQL, (2) Health endpoint reports degraded status per subsystem including real Redis connectivity checks, (3) Ingestion job logs at Warning/Error on repeated failures. All 23 task-specific tests pass.
